featureName: Dates relatives pour interventions du bail
description: Remplacer le DatePicker brut par un dropdown d'options relatives (X mois avant/après échéance) dans l'étape Interventions du wizard de création de bail. Chaque template définit ses propres options. Option 'Date personnalisée' ouvre un DatePicker. Option dynamique pour l'assurance basée sur la date d'expiration du document.

userStories.title: Définir les scheduling options par template
userStories.description: As a developer, I want each LeaseInterventionTemplate to define its own list of relative scheduling options so the dropdown is contextual per intervention type
acceptanceCriteria: New SchedulingOption type with value, label, and calculateDate function
Each of the 6 templates has a schedulingOptions array + defaultOption
A CUSTOM_DATE_OPTION constant exists for the 'Date personnalisée' fallback
Missing document interventions also have scheduling options (7j, 14j, 1 mois)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added SchedulingOption interface, CUSTOM_DATE_VALUE/OPTION, INSURANCE_EXPIRY_NEXT_DAY_VALUE. Each of 6 templates + missing doc factory has schedulingOptions[] and defaultSchedulingOption.

userStories.title: Enrichir ScheduledInterventionData avec selectedOption
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ScheduledInterventionData to track which scheduling option is selected so the UI can render the correct dropdown state
acceptanceCriteria: ScheduledInterventionData has selectedSchedulingOption: string field
ScheduledInterventionData has availableOptions: SchedulingOption[] field
contract-form-container initializes both fields from template defaults
Insurance reminder gets dynamic option when expiry date is available
When startDate/duration/chargesType changes, options recalculate dates
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Extended ScheduledInterventionData with availableOptions and selectedSchedulingOption. Container useEffect builds options from template, injects dynamic insurance option with INSURANCE_EXPIRY_NEXT_DAY_VALUE. Date calculated from selected option.

userStories.title: Refondre InterventionScheduleRow avec Select dropdown
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see a dropdown with meaningful relative date options instead of a raw DatePicker so I understand when and why each intervention is scheduled
acceptanceCriteria: DatePicker replaced by Select dropdown showing available options
Selecting an option recalculates the date automatically
Calculated date shown in readable text next to dropdown (ex: '02 décembre 2030')
Selecting 'Date personnalisée' shows a DatePicker below the Select
Badge 'Auto' shown when a relative option is selected (not custom)
Disabled state shows '—' as before
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Rewrote InterventionScheduleRow: Select dropdown replaces DatePicker, conditional DatePicker for custom mode, readable date text, Auto badge for relative options. Width increased to 240px for dropdown.

userStories.title: Propager onSchedulingOptionChange dans LeaseInterventionsStep
userStories.description: As a developer, I want LeaseInterventionsStep to handle scheduling option changes and propagate them to the parent container
acceptanceCriteria: LeaseInterventionsStep passes onSchedulingOptionChange to each row
contract-form-container handles option changes: recalculates date from option
Changing startDate/duration recalculates all auto dates based on selected options
Insurance dynamic option updates when document expiry date changes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Merged with US-003 since tightly coupled. LeaseInterventionsStep now receives startDate+endDate, has handleSchedulingOptionChange that recalculates dates from options. Container passes parseLocalDate/calculateContractEndDate results.
